wiki.summary: “still standing” is the fifth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis and continues the run of melodic tracks. The melodic instrumental, which was produced by frequent collaborator, Rok, consists of synth melodies, with hard-hitting bass and fast-paced drums. On March 5, 2026, on the night before the album’s release, Nettspend would post a promotional video, which featured randomly selected individuals reviewing the track, on his secondary Instagram account. Nettspend released “still standing” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
